---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Platform:** iOS / macOS / Windows / Linux
- **App Version:** 1.0.0
- **OS Version:** e.g., iOS 16.0, macOS 12.5, Windows 11
- **Device:** iPhone 14, M1 MacBook Pro, etc. (or N/A for simulator)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Logs
If applicable, include relevant console logs or error messages.

## Workaround (if any)
Steps you've taken to work around the issue.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
